message:
feat: add tour steps and palette commands for new demo sections

Extend the guided tour and command palette with entries for all 12
sections.

Tour script additions (steps 13-18):
- Drawing Primitives: Box styles, titled boxes, partial sides
- Color System: Gradients, HSV wheel, alpha blending
- Input Handling: Cursor styles, focus events, bracketed paste
- Editing Features: EditBuffer, rope storage, undo/redo
- Terminal Capabilities: Feature detection display
- Animations & Easing: Easing curves, pulse animations

The finale step moves from position 13 to 19 to accommodate new steps.

Command palette additions:
- Go to Overview [1] through Go to Animations [=]
- Each command shows the keyboard shortcut in brackets
- 12 new navigation commands matching Section::key_hint()

This completes the UI for the 12-section demo showcase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
